channel.title: htaccess on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in htaccess on IT notes

item.title: haproxy
item.description: HAproxy + HTTP auth + IP SRC Use HTTP Auth when source IP is not from an allowed source: userlist TestUsers user guest insecure-password secret backend test-node acl network_allowed src 10.0.0.1 192.30.252.0/22 acl AuthOK http_auth(TempUsers) http-request auth realm Test if !network_allowed !AuthOK server test test.server.tld:80 maxconn 50 check To only allow specific range, for example only GitHub: acl network_allowed src 192.30.252.0/22 185.199.108.0/22 http-request deny if !network_allowed HAproxy + mysql First setup mysql by creating a HAproxy to do the checks:
